name: accountant24-extension
description: Accountant24 pi coding agent extension — domain-specific accounting tools, commands, and system prompt for hledger-based bookkeeping.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(__dirname,'package.json'),'utf8'));const deps=pkg.dependencies||{};const missing=Object.keys(deps).filter(dep=>!fs.existsSync(path.join(__dirname,'node_modules',dep)));if(missing.length){console.log('🔧 Installing missing dependencies:',missing.join(', '));require('child_process').execSync('npm install',{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('✅ All extension dependencies already installed.');}"
